title: Dashboard error standardization, silent catch fixes, audit RBAC tightening
summary: Replaced raw NextResponse.json error calls in audit/route.ts with badRequest()/internalError() helpers. Fixed 4 silent catch {} blocks in models/route.ts GET handler with console.warn logging. Changed audit endpoint permission from 'models:read' to 'audit:read' to enforce authentication for sensitive audit logs.

task7_error_standardization.description: Replaced 2 raw NextResponse.json error responses with badRequest() and internalError() helpers

task8_silent_catches.description: Added console.warn logging to 4 empty catch {} blocks in GET handler (policies.json, model-router-state.json, skill-rl.json, rate-limit-fallback.json)
task8_silent_catches.impact: Parse errors for optional config files are now logged instead of silently swallowed

task9_error_boundaries.description: Both src/app/error.tsx and src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx verified present and correct

task10_rbac_audit.impact: Audit logs now require authentication (models:read allowed unauthenticated access via exception list in write-access.ts line 192)

test_results.note: All 15 failures are pre-existing (orchestration-route and providers-route auth fixture issues)
